//: KAN-1017 — engine core typecheck. Standalone (NOT in apps/api's compile graph;
intentional and preserved here). The CI gate at .github/workflows/ci.yml runs
this config via scripts/typecheck-baseline-gate.sh and compares the output
against the committed baseline at .tsc-baseline.txt (signature diff; line/col
shifts don't false-trip — only NEW error classes fail the gate).
src/services/hubspot-sync.ts is excluded because the file is genuinely
byte-corrupted (~9040 invalid bytes starting at line 505) in the original
commit afe6885 (KAN-25, 2026-04-15) — not a re-encoding fix. The file has
never been touched since first-commit. Restoring it requires re-deriving from
the KAN-25 spec or a clean source, tracked as a separate ticket. Excluded here
so tsc can produce a clean parse-tree for the rest of the engine. Tests are
excluded too — the cross-workspace runner (apps/connectors vitest) handles them.
